'''Nolar''' was a wealthy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], a commercial center plagued by thieves. [[Mining/Legends|Mining]] equipment was manufactured on the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers]]'' {{1st}}
